name: wf-ask-get-clear
title: Get Clear Workflow
description: Workflow skill that turns a fuzzy topic into one clear problem statement and a usable question stack. Use when the user needs help asking a better question before asking for the answer.
purpose: Compose question clarification and scaffolding into one reusable question-design workflow.
when_to_use: Need a clear problem statement and question stack in one pass.
Need a reusable workflow entrypoint before deeper challenge or answer work.
Need a named composition rather than manually listing clarify plus scaffold each time.
do_not_use: Need assumption-challenging reframing in the same workflow.

required_inputs.name: TOPIC
required_inputs.description: Raw topic or rough thought to clarify into a question.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Target reader or decision-maker for the future answer.

required_inputs.name: CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Scope, evidence, time, or deliverable constraints.

input_contract_notes: TOPIC can be rough or messy; this workflow exists to turn that into a usable question handle.
Keep CONSTRAINTS short and concrete; the workflow will surface the dominant one.

structured_outputs.name: EXPANDED_ATOMIC_PATH
structured_outputs.description: Expanded atomic path used by the workflow.

neutrality_rules: Preserve the neutrality rules of each underlying atomic skill.
Do not expand into answer content while shaping the question.
Keep the workflow transparent by exposing the expanded skill list.
output_contract_notes: QUESTION_STACK should stay short enough to act on immediately.
EXPANDED_ATOMIC_PATH must preserve the real execution order.
execution_constraints: Prefer one usable problem statement over multiple half-bounded prompts.
Keep the stack focused on the core decision the audience actually needs.
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs},deterministic-output | lens: inversion-focus | output: md(contract=v1)]
mandatory_rules: Expose the expanded atomic path explicitly.
Keep the workflow output short enough that the user can ask or refine the question immediately.
example_invocation:
$wf-ask-get-clear
TOPIC: AI 코드 리뷰 도구를 팀에 도입하면 실제로 생산성이 올라갈까?
AUDIENCE: engineering manager
